title: [MOR]Major overhaul and reorganization
description: ✨A modpack that focuses on integrating client optimization, aesthetics, and usability.
body:
# 🚩 MOR Modpack – Full English Guide

> **中文主页 / 中文下载与教程** | [BBSMC](https://bbsmc.net/project/mor)

---

## 📦 What Is MOR?
- **Type**: Pure **client-side** modpack – install it in your local launcher and connect to **(almost) any server**.  
  > ⚠️ **Do NOT** drop it into a server folder; it is **not** a server pack.  
- **Origin**: Originally built for a single private server, open-sourced after that server shut down.  
- **Tech Stack**: Forked from *Fabulously Optimized*, then **completely rebuilt** on **Sodium’s high-version branch** (latest Sodium + Iris).

---

## 🎯 Design Goals
| Eye-Candy | Performance | Freedom |
|-----------|-------------|---------|
| Shader-friendly defaults, cinematic camera, immersive particles | ~2× FPS over vanilla on mid-tier GPUs | Every config file exposed; users are **encouraged** to tweak & redistribute |

> **Not** a bare-bones “max-FPS” pack – if you want the absolute minimum latency, look elsewhere.

---

## 📥 Installation (3-Minute Setup)
1. **Prerequisites**:   
   - **Java 17+** (bundled with most launchers).  

2. **Download**  
   - **Latest stable**: **≥ 2.1.0** on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mor/versions) or [中文镜像](https://bbsmc.net/project/mor).  
   - **Legacy 1.x.x**: unsupported, buggy, **do not use**.

3. **Import**  
   - Drag the `.mrpack` file into your launcher → import → done.

4. **Optional**  
   - Chinese language pack: [Modrinth resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mor-setting) (manual install).  
   - Personalization guide (Chinese): [Bilibili post](https://www.bilibili.com/opus/1095837807286419464).


---

## ❓ FAQ
- **Server compatibility?**  
  Works on **any server** that doesn’t force a broken resource pack.  
- **OptiFine?**  
  **Not included**—use Iris + Sodium for better performance.  
- **Mac / ARM support?**  
  Yes, Apple Silicon & Mesa drivers tested.  
- **Need help?**  
  - English: GitHub Issues (soon)  
  - 中文：在 [BBSMC](https://bbsmc.net/project/mor) 回帖

---

## 📄 License
**MIT License** – do whatever you want.  
The full legal text (in both English & Chinese) is shipped inside the modpack root as `LICENSE.txt`; you can also read it [here](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT).
